oracle.base_query: SELECT c.SALESTRANID, c.SALESTRANDETAILID, c.CHARGELINEITEMID, SUBSTR(c.SOURCEHEADERKEY, 1, INSTR(c.SOURCEHEADERKEY, '.') - 1) AS SOURCENUMBER, SUBSTR(c.SOURCEHEADERKEY, INSTR(c.SOURCEHEADERKEY, '.') + 1) AS OTLINK, c.CHARGENUMBER AS OTRID, sl_seq.SOURCESEQNUMBER AS OTSEQ, sl_ssq.SOURCEDETAILID5 AS OTSSQ, sl_cue.SOURCEDETAILID4 AS OTCUE, sl_shp.SOURCEDETAILID3 AS OTSHP, c.SOURCEINSERTDATE, c.SOURCEINSERTUSERID, c.SOURCEUPDATEDATE, c.SOURCEUPDATEUSERID, c.INSERTDATE, c.UPDATEDATE, c.CHARGENUMBER, c.CHARGETAXCODETYPE, c.CHARGETYPE, c.CHARGECATEGORY, c.CHARGEDESCRIPTION, c.CHARGEAMOUNT, c.TAXPERCENTAGE, c.TAXABLEIND, c.POSTINGPRODUCTSKU, c.SOURCESYSTEMID FROM CEX01_OWN.CHARGELINEITEMASSOC c LEFT JOIN CEX01_OWN.SALESTRANLINEITEM sl_seq ON c.SALESTRANID = sl_seq.SALESTRANID AND c.SALESTRANDETAILID = sl_seq.SALESTRANDETAILID AND sl_seq.SOURCESYSTEMTABLE = 'FIXME_TABLE_FOR_OTSEQ' LEFT JOIN CEX01_OWN.SALESTRANLINEITEM sl_ssq ON c.SALESTRANID = sl_ssq.SALESTRANID AND c.SALESTRANDETAILID = sl_ssq.SALESTRANDETAILID AND sl_ssq.SOURCESYSTEMTABLE = 'FIXME_TABLE_FOR_OTSSQ' LEFT JOIN CEX01_OWN.SALESTRANLINEITEM sl_cue ON c.SALESTRANID = sl_cue.SALESTRANID AND c.SALESTRANDETAILID = sl_cue.SALESTRANDETAILID AND sl_cue.SOURCESYSTEMTABLE = 'FIXME_TABLE_FOR_OTCUE' LEFT JOIN CEX01_OWN.SALESTRANLINEITEM sl_shp ON c.SALESTRANID = sl_shp.SALESTRANID AND c.SALESTRANDETAILID = sl_shp.SALESTRANDETAILID AND sl_shp.SOURCESYSTEMTABLE = 'FIXME_TABLE_FOR_OTSHP'
